title: My family
objective: Nombrar familiares y describir relaciones básicas usando my, your, his y her.

activities.feedback_correct: El hijo de tu madre puede ser tu hermano.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa en un hombre de tu misma familia inmediata.

activities.feedback_correct: La hija de tu padre es tu hermana.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la palabra para una mujer de tu familia inmediata.

activities.prompt: This is Ana. ___ mother is a doctor.
activities.feedback_correct: Ana es mujer; usamos her para hablar de su madre.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige el posesivo correspondiente a Ana.

activities.instruction: Une cada familiar con su significado.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Relaciona cada palabra con la persona correcta de la familia.

activities.feedback_correct: This is presenta a una persona y my indica relación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con This is y coloca my antes de sister.

activities.prompt: This is my family. My mother is Maria, my father is Luis, and my brother is Diego.
activities.question: What is the brother's name?
activities.feedback_correct: Diego es el hermano mencionado al final.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la frase después de my brother is.

activities.prompt: mother, father, sister, brother. This is my mother. This is my brother.
evaluation_criteria: clear th in mother and father
activities.feedback_correct: Los nombres familiares se entienden con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica el sonido th sin convertirlo en t o d y termina claramente brother.

activities.prompt: Sofia has one brother and two sisters. Her brother is fifteen. Her sisters are ten and twelve.
activities.question: How many sisters does Sofia have?
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el número junto a sisters.

activities.prompt: Write five sentences about your family. Use family words and at least three possessive adjectives.
activities.feedback_correct: Describes familiares y relaciones con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa si usas my, your, his, her o their según la persona.

activities.instruction: Habla de tu familia con la IA.
activities.prompt: Show the AI a fictional family photo. Name four people, explain their relationships, and answer follow-up questions.
success_criteria: uses at least four family words
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes explicar relaciones familiares básicas en conversación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te ofrece un árbol familiar y corrige una relación cada vez.
